name: Soda Nikka Co., Ltd.
summary: Soda Nikka Co., Ltd. engages in the trade of soda products in Japan. It also trades in inorganic/organic chemicals, petrochemical products, and synthetic resin products, as well as supplies caustic soda and other products. In addition, the company offers various industrial chemicals, electronic materials, processed products, facilities/equipment, and containers. Soda Nikka Co., Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
